Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kanatalia]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — Kanatalia is a place where alchemists hold parties.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Kanatalia is part of the Guild of Alchemists.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Kanatalia investigated Fletcher for manufacturing illicit substances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Kanatalia is a place where one can be an apprentice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Kanatalia has a chapter house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Meia was left in the care of Kanatalia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — Kanatalia is a location that may produce modern devices.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Kanatalia only responds to blatant attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Kanatalia is a location containing various alchemical workshops.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Kanatalia rejects certain third-rate alchemical supplies.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Kanatalia has a grand Alchemical Academy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Kanatalia is home to the best medical alchemists in the world.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
